components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA buttons with forest green background
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 22px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.005em; transition: background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease; border: 1px solid transparent; background-color: #2D4D31; color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #1F3522; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action buttons with light background
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 22px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.005em; transition: background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease; border: 1px solid #ECEDEA; background-color: #F7F7F5; color: #1F3522; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #EEF3EF; border-color: #2D4D31; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 22px; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.92rem; letter-spacing: 0.005em; transition: background-color 220ms ease, color 220ms ease; border: 1px solid #2D4D31; background-color: transparent; color: #2D4D31; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background-color: #2D4D31; color: #FFFFFF; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content cards with white background and subtle border
components.html:
Card Title

Card description text goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #ECEDEA; border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: border-color 220ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #D8DAD6; } .ds-card-media { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; background-color: #F7F7F5; } .ds-card-body { padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; flex: 1; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Lora, Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.2rem; color: #1F3522; font-weight: 500; margin: 0; } .ds-card-text { color: #6F7670; font-size: 0.92rem; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Form text input with border and focus state
components.css: .ds-input { border: 1px solid #ECEDEA; border-radius: 4px; padding: 11px 14px; font-size: 0.92rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #14201A; background-color: #FFFFFF; transition: border-color 220ms ease, box-shadow 220ms ease; outline: none; width: 100%; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2D4D31; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(45, 77, 49, 0.10); background-color: #FFFFFF; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9CA39E; }

components.name: Navigation
components.description: Sticky navbar with brand and navigation links
components.html:
W
Warkop MedanJakarta
  • Home
  • About
  • Menu
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-navbar { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid #ECEDEA; } .ds-navbar-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 72px; max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; } .ds-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; } .ds-logo { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 4px; background-color: #2D4D31; color: #FFFFFF; display: grid; place-items: center; font-family: Lora, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-brand-text { display: flex; flex-direction: column; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-brand-name { font-family: Lora, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 500; color: #1F3522; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-brand-tag { font-size: 0.68rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #6F7670; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 0.9rem; color: #6F7670; font-weight: 500; position: relative; transition: color 220ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #2D4D31; }

components.name: Tag
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; background-color: #F7F7F5; color: #6F7670; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 0.72rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; border: 1px solid #ECEDEA; } .ds-tag-accent { background-color: #EEF3EF; color: #1F3522; border-color: transparent; }

narrative.overview: Sistem visual ini menangkap suasana kedai kopi lokal yang hangat dan relax — seperti corner cafe yang jadi tempat kumpl anak muda Medan. Palette white + deep forest green memberikan keyakinan dan ketenangan tanpa terlihat dingin atau terlalu korporat. Font pairing Lora (serif) untuk heading + Inter (sans) untuk body memberikan karakter yang warmth tapi tetap readable.
keyCharacteristics: Warm minimalism: Clean tapi tidak sterile. White background dengan green accents yang purposeful
Quiet confidence: Desain tidak rame. Biarkan konten (menu, outlet photos, events) jadi hero
Local authenticity: Visual yang mencerminkan kultur Medan, bukan AI-generated aesthetic
Approachable: Setiap pengguna merasa welcome — dari student yang cari kopi sampai businessman yang mau investasi

rules.name: The Subtle Surface Rule
rules.body: Background surfaces are white or warm off-white only. Never use tinted backgrounds beyond these two neutrals.

rules.name: The Primary Scarcity Rule
rules.body: Forest green appears on ≤15% of any given screen. Its rarity is the point.

rules.name: The Heading Voice Rule
rules.body: All headings use Lora. Never mix heading fonts.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to interaction or as elevation.

dos: Do use white or warm off-white backgrounds only. Keep surfaces clean.
Do use Lora for all headings and Inter for body text consistently.
Do use forest green sparingly — for CTAs, active states, and accent moments only.
Do maintain 4.5:1+ contrast ratio for body text against background.
Do use the established 8px radius for cards and 4px for buttons.
Do apply subtle shadows only on hover or elevation, never on resting state.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism or heavy blur effects decoratively.
Don't add border-left/right colored stripes > 1px on cards or list items.
Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as default scaffolding.
Don't add eyebrow (kicker) above every section — use purposefully.
Don't create identical card grids with same icon + heading + text pattern repeated.
Don't use placeholder gray text that doesn't meet 4.5:1 contrast.
Don't mix heading fonts — Lora only for headings.
Don't animate CSS layout properties unnecessarily.
